ffdec-17.0.2.patch

* Cleanup Makefile a bit (proper JAVA_VERSION, adding NO_ARCH, removing an extra space)
* Update distinfo
* Update pkg-plist

Because the port doesn't have anything to build, I only tested in poudriere in order to fix the Makefile and pkg-plist. Passes portlint.
